title: Conditional branching (visibleIf)
description: visibleIf routes respondents past questions that don't apply. The shown-set is captured from the engine at submit time and threads to was_shown in marts — shown-skipped and routed-past stay distinguishable; routing is never re-evaluated in SQL (invariant 3). Every gated question must be reachable by some answer, or the round-trip gate rejects publication.

elements.name: car_fuel
elements.title: What does it run on?
elements.description: Reachable only when owns_car = 'yes'. A respondent who answers 'no' is routed past it (was_shown = false), which is not the same as leaving it blank.

elements.name: no_car_reason
elements.title: What's the main reason you don't own one?
elements.description: The complementary branch — reachable only when owns_car = 'no'. Defaults to pii_risk 'high'.
